heading: Encouragement of more generous leave policies
label: 2653 Encouragement of more generous leave policies
text: Nothing in this Act or any amendment made by this Act shall be construed to discourage employers from adopting or retaining leave policies more generous than any policies that comply with the requirements under this Act or any amendment made by this Act.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Family and Medical Leave Act of 1993, which enacted this chapter, sections 60m and 60n of Title 2, The Congress, and sections 6381 to 6387 of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, amended , and enacted provisions set out as notes under .
